Class CollectionPredicate.Builder<T, P extends Predicate<T>>

    CollectionPredicate.Builder<T,P>
    matchSize(Range.Int size)
    Specifies that the collection's size must be inside the size range.
    CollectionPredicate.Builder<T,P>
    mustContain(P predicate)
    Specifies that predicate must match at least once.
    CollectionPredicate.Builder<T,P>
    mustMatchCount(P predicate, Range.Int count)
    Specifies that the number of times that predicate matches must fall in the count range.

  • Method Details

    • mustContain

      public CollectionPredicate.Builder<T,P> mustContain(P predicate)
      Specifies that predicate must match at least once.

    • mustMatchCount

      public CollectionPredicate.Builder<T,P> mustMatchCount(P predicate, Range.Int count)
      Specifies that the number of times that predicate matches must fall in the count range.

    • matchSize

      public CollectionPredicate.Builder<T,P> matchSize(@Nullable Range.Int size)
      Specifies that the collection's size must be inside the size range.
